content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1527: Retaliation Starts From You!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Empty Land, deep inside the Sea Domain of Nihility.

Pieces of broken stars and asteroids gathered and created an endless continent. Cities were built inland. Some were small with a population of tens of thousands of people, but some were big enough for hundreds of thousands of people to dwell in.

Dozens of thousands of years ago, this place was just a black void of space without a single rock.

A warrior had traveled to this area and found so many territory entrances that were like adjoining whirlpools on the seabed of the Sea of Annihilation.

He had spent dozens of years exploring those territory entrances. He found that each of them lead to a strange world.

Those territories had a lot of natural resources and strange races living and cultivating. Those were the lands that were full of earth and heaven energy and very suitable for warriors to cultivate in.

He told his friends about his findings. Gradually, more and more warriors went to explore those territories. They had established the bases by those territory entrances.

Some experts with supernatural powers had moved the asteroids and built cities. The hotshots were sent to guard their cities year-round.

After millions of years, many races had risen. The Seven Great Clans slowly became overwhelming. More and more warriors guided the broken pieces of the stars and massive asteroids to this area. They then built fortresses and cities. After a long time, broken stars and asteroids joined together and created a continent.

This continent didn’t exist at first. Since it was created piece by piece, it was called Empty Land.

Empty Land had many territory entrances leading to different territories. Slowly, it became a crowded, lively area. Just like the Sea of Annihilation, it attracted the Seven Great Clans. They had all come and established their bases with elite forces.

Currents of people didn’t cease in front of the territory entrances. They were exploiting ores and natural resources in those territories. Empty Land was their trading center where they exchanged their products for pellets or spirit stones to improve their powers.

After tens of thousands of years, the Empty City on Empty Land had become one of the biggest trading centers in the Sea Domain of Nihility. The Empty City was created by many smaller cities. It was very famous in the Sea Domain of Nihility and it attracted a lot of warriors.

———————————

A corner of Empty Land.

A massive, red rock was hovering and it was around ten times bigger than the Immortal Island. A spacious city was situated on that rock. From a distance, the city looked like a giant beast that was crouching and threatening people in their minds.

This city was one of the Ancient Monster Clan’s cities. On Empty Land, the Ancient Monster Tribe didn’t have just one city. Currently, this place was given to Ferrell. Many warriors of the Ancient Monster Tribe cultivating lightning had come and become Ferrell’s subordinates for a chance to learn the mysteries of Lightning and Thunder power Upanishad from him.

In the highest tower of the city, the ground was inlaid with blue crystals. Lightning flashed inside those crystals and made the warriors look like they were walking on lightning.

Ferrell was wearing precious garments, sitting on a massage chair and watching the city in front of him. In Empty City, those smaller cities belonged to different clans, including the Soul Clan, the Mysterious Sky Clan, the Devouring Clan, the Black Demon Clan, the Phantom Clan, and the White Bone Clan.

Six beautiful maids from different races wore flimsy clothes that exposed their white skin. They were holding fruit trays, smiling and serving Ferrell. A girl from the Arctic Fox Tribe who was about seventeen years old, had an oval face with picturesque brows, her eyes bright when she shoved her body onto Ferrell’s chest. “Sir, when will you teach me the power Upanishad?”

This little girl was from the Arctic Fox Tribe, a dependent tribe of the Ancient Monster Tribe. She had cultivated Lightning and Thunder power Upanishad to the Incipient God Realm. When she heard that Ferrell had joined the Ancient Monster Tribe, she volunteered to serve him and use her beauty to exchange for knowledge of her power Upanishad. Ferrell liked her very much.

The other five girls were also from the tribes dependent on the Ancient Monster Tribe. They were all beautiful and cultivating Lightning power Upanishad. They had volunteered to serve Ferrell with the hope to perceive more knowledge of Lightning power Upanishad from him.

In the Sea Domain of Nihility, the competition was harsh. Many tribes dependent on the Ancient Monster Tribe were fighting in the dark. Among them, the Arctic Fox Tribe was a small and weak one. The women of this tribe were pretty, but they didn’t have good innate talents or vigorous bodies. Usually, they came to depend on the stronger races.

Each girl of the Arctic Fox Tribe would choose to depend on the experts of the Ancient Monster Tribe. They used their beauty to earn favors and increase their competence.

It was an easy method somehow.

“No need to hurry. After the meeting, I will rest and then teach you.” Ferrell squinted, his big hands rubbing her round rear end. He was looking at a city far in front of him and was suspicious.

After they had failed in the Sea of Annihilation, Edgar, Beverly, and Judy didn’t give up. They had talked for a long time.

Of course, Ferrell wasn’t qualified to join the meeting. He didn’t know what Edgar, Beverly, and Judy had discussed. He just knew that it was related to Sauron, one of the Ten Great Territory Ancestors.

After that, Beverly sent Ferrell and Keith to Empty Land and asked them to stay and wait for Beverly.

Neptune and Oliver didn’t return to their clans. They came to Empty Land too. They said that they needed to join an important meeting.

The three Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm experts Beverly, Edgar, and Judy didn’t go to Empty Land. The others didn’t know where they went.

Ferrell had been waiting for a long time. He had asked Keith several times to see if Beverly was back. Keith told him not to hurry and that Beverly would come soon, so he should be patient.

Meanwhile, Ferrell had used the Ancient Monster Tribe’s channels to check the territory where Shi Yan and Emperor Sea Shark went. Slowly, he discovered some clues. Ferrell had discreetly contacted Neptune and Keith. After they had located the territory, they were going to join hands to kill Shi Yan, the potential danger.

“Sir Ferrell, here comes the prisoner.” A dark voice came from a long corridor behind him. A savage member of the Ancient Monster Tribe came and held out a Phantom woman in his hand. The woman was around thirty years old, her beautiful face gory.

Two sharp lances were pierced through her limbs to shackle her and stop her from moving.

She had bloodstains all over her body. Apparently, she was tortured. The brutal Ancient Monster Tribe warrior held her hair and raised her in front of Ferrell. The poor woman’s eyes were filled with resentment. She said through gritted teeth, “My fellows will never forgive you. Madam Montecie will kill you.”

She was Kelan, a member of the Phantom Clan. She was responsible for collecting information in Empty Land. Three days ago, she was kidnapped while buying cultivating materials.

“In which territory?” Ferrell wore a cold face. Looking at the poor figure of the woman, he just laughed, “Montecie? She killed my mount and cleared my base on the seabed of the Sea of Annihilation. Because of her, I’m going to kill your Phantom Clan! You should know that I finished all of your fellows on the island in the Sea of Annihilation. But I’m living well, aren’t I?”

“You won’t stay content for long!” Kelan shouted and wiggled. Electricity ran through the lances and reached her heart.

The cuts on her body cracked open and she bled terribly.

“Haha, Sir Reed, you’re so cruel. You scare us.” The girls by Ferrell covered their mouths and giggled. However, they looked excited as if they really wanted to see the bloody scene.

“She knows the location. I haven’t wormed the name of the territory out of her yet. I think you can do that easily, Sir...” the Ancient Monster Tribe warrior grinned fiendishly.

He was Reed and he was cultivating Lightning power Upanishad to Second Sky of Immortal Realm. He had become Ferrell’s subordinate.

“Yeah, it’s not difficult.” Ferrell pushed the Arctic Fox girl with the pretty face away. He placed one hand on Kelan’s head. Electric beams shot out from his hand and moved toward Kelan’s soul altar like snakes to search through her memories.

Blood ran from Kelan’s eyes, nostrils, and mouth. The electric beams had damaged her soul terribly. After Ferrell was done searching, her soul was going to perish or break, making her a person without memories.

Reed stood indifferently. He was teasing the girls of the Ancient Monster Tribe and watching Kelan convulse painfully. Her life energy fluctuated weakly.

Kelan’s skin dimmed and horribly paled. She looked like a corpse.

The beautiful Ancient Monster Tribe girls were disgusted by her. They moved away as they were afraid that Kelan’s blood would stain them when her body exploded.

Sizzle! Sizzle! Sizzle!

Strange electric beams emerged by Reed. Space began to ripple. Reed changed his visage and retreated instinctively.

A silhouette appeared in so many ripples and became visible.

“Shi Yan!” Ferrell was shaken as if he saw ghosts in daylight. Looking at that man, he grinned fiendishly, “Good timing! I was worried that I wouldn’t find you. Hahaha! God is helping me haha. The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower is predestined to be mine!”

As soon as Ferrell’s laughter arose, the members of the Ancient Monster Tribe from every corner in the city gathered. Shadows of experts came and besieged the one who had just used the Space power Upanishad here.

After the warriors from hundreds of meters around gathered, the ripples ceased. Shi Yan emerged. He checked Ferrell and saw that Kelan was nearly dead. He wore a cold face as he said, “Ferrell, my slaughter will start with you!”
